ST10-001.name: Trafalgar Law
ST10-001.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −3 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less at the bottom of the owner's deck, and play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand.

ST10-002.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
ST10-002.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] If you have 0 DON!! cards on your field or 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

ST10-003.name: Eustass"Captain"Kid
ST10-003.effect: [Your Turn] If you have 4 or more Life cards, give this Leader −1000 power.

ST10-004.name: Sanji
ST10-004.effect: [On Play] If your opponent has a Character with 5000 or more power, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn.

ST10-005.name: Jinbe
ST10-005.effect: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.

ST10-006.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
ST10-006.effect: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

ST10-007.name: Killer
ST10-007.effect: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

ST10-008.name: Shachi & Penguin
ST10-008.effect: [On Play] If you have 3 or less DON!! cards on your field, add up to 2 DON!! cards from your DON!! deck and rest them.

ST10-009.name: Jean Bart
ST10-009.effect: [On Play] ➀ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.): Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

ST10-010.name: Trafalgar Law
ST10-010.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

ST10-011.name: Heat
ST10-011.effect: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, this Character gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn.

ST10-012.name: Bepo
ST10-012.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

ST10-013.name: Eustass"Captain"Kid
ST10-013.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Up to 1 of your Leader gains +1000 power until the start of your next turn.

ST10-014.name: Wire
ST10-014.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

ST10-015.name: Gum-Gum Giant Sumo Slap
ST10-015.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle, and K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less.

ST10-016.name: Gum-Gum Kong Gatling
ST10-016.effect: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 7000 power or less.

ST10-017.name: Punk Vise
ST10-017.effect: [Main] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less, and add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
